$description: FIT message schemas found in SKIN_TEMP files. 1 file per day.

skin_temp_overnight_mesgs.description: Nightly skin temperature summary — deviation from personal baseline

local_timestamp.description: Local time as integer (Unix timestamp format, not datetime object)

average_deviation.description: Average deviation from personal baseline. Positive = warmer than normal, negative = cooler.

average_7_day_deviation.description: 7-day smoothed deviation from baseline. Useful for trend detection.

gotchas: Temperature values are DEVIATIONS from personal baseline, NOT absolute temperatures (except nightly_value).
Only 1 reading per night — no intraday view possible.
Consistent positive shifts of +0.5C or more may indicate illness/fever.
local_timestamp is stored as integer, not datetime.

unknown_397.description: Raw temperature readings — undocumented, not parsed. Likely continuous overnight temperature samples.
